title: KKR Appoints Kimberly A. Ross as New Independent Director
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) today announced that Kimberly A. Ross has been appointed to the Board of Directors of KKR & Co. Inc. (the “Company” and, together with its subsidiaries, “KKR”) effective September 20, 2023. Her appointment will bring the number of independent directors to ten out of a total of fourteen Board seats. Ms. Ross is the former Chief Financial Officer of several public companies, including WeWork Inc., Baker Hughes Company, Avon Products, I.

title: SEC intensifies probe of Wall Street's WhatsApp usage
text: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has escalated its investigation into Wall Street's use of private messaging applications, collecting thousands of staff messages from over a dozen major investment companies. As per Reuters, the SEC's heightened scrutiny is aimed at assessing potential breaches of record-keeping rules and ensuring compliance within the financial sector.

title: SEC obtains thousands of Wall Street staffers' WhatsApp messages as probe widens: sources
text: In the latest phase of the probe of more than a dozen investment advisers, the SEC has in recent months asked for messages on personal devices or applications during the first half of 2021 that discuss business, sources said.

title: Explainer: What's at stake in Telecom Italia grid deal?
text: U.S. fund KKR and the Italian Treasury have teamed up to buy Telecom Italia's (TIM) landline grid, in a deal that could ultimately be worth about 23 billion euros ($24.38 billion).

title: KKR asks Telecom Italia to extend deadline for grid bid
text: U.S. fund KKR has asked Telecom Italia (TIM) to push back a Sept. 30 deadline to submit a multi-billion euro binding offer for the phone group's landline network until Oct.15, TIM said on Friday.

title: KKR to buy 20% stake in Singtel's data-center business
text: Private-equity firm KKR has agreed to buy a 20% stake in the regional data-center business of Singapore Telecommunications for 1.1 billion Singapore dollars (US$800.0 million).

title: KKR to acquire stake in SingTel's regional data centre unit for $807 million
text: Singapore Telecommunications said on Monday private equity firm KKR will acquire a 20% stake in the firm's regional data centre business with an investment commitment of up to S$1.1 billion ($806.87 million).

title: KKR to Acquire 20% Stake in Singtel's Regional Data Centre Business Valued at S$5.5 Billion
text: SINGAPORE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR to acquire 20% stake in Singtel's regional data centre business valued at S$5.5 billion.

title: KKR & Co. Inc. Announces Conversion Rate for Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) announced today that its outstanding 6.00% Series C Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock (the “Preferred Stock”), will automatically convert into shares of the Company's common stock on September 15, 2023 (the “conversion date”). The conversion rate for each share of Preferred Stock will be 1.1700 shares of the Company's common stock. Cash will be paid in lieu of fractional shares of common stock. title: 3 Hot Picks From One of Wall Street's Most Influential Money Managers
text: Bill Nygren, the long-time portfolio manager of the Oakmark Fund (MUTF:OAKMX), recently appeared on Morningstar's The Long View podcast to discuss the markets. Having managed the $8 billion large-cap fund since 2000, the veteran investor's hot stock picks are always in demand by investors.

title: KKR pays $1B to become largest shareholder of USI Insurance Services
text: USI Insurance Services in Monday said existing shareholder KKR & Co. Inc. KKR, +2.35% is making a new equity investment of more than $1 billion in the Briarcliff Manor, N.Y.-based risk management, employee benefits and retirement consulting company.

title: KKR to take big stake in UK electric battery group - report
text: KKR, the New York-listed private equity giant, is poised to take joint control of Zenobe, one of the UK's leading battery storage start-ups, according to reports today. The deal will see KKR buy a 45% stake in a transaction that values Zenobe at about £800 million, according to Sky News.

title: Apollo, KKR Could Join S&P 500 After Blackstone, Says Analyst
text: Wells Fargo analyst Finian O'Shea reaffirmed bullish views on KKR and Apollo Management stock, noting they could join the index.
